# LPError.Code.metadataFetchTimedOut

**Case**

An error indicating that the metadata fetch took longer than allowed.

## Declaration

```swift
case metadataFetchTimedOut
```

## Error cases

- **LPError.Code.metadataFetchCancelled**: An error indicating that the metadata fetch was canceled by the client.
- **LPError.Code.metadataFetchFailed**: An error indicating that a metadata fetch failed.
- **LPError.Code.unknown**: An unknown error.

items.description: An error indicating that the metadata fetch was canceled by the client.
